title: Complete checkout with shipping details and cash on delivery
description: Verifies that a logged-in shopper can enter shipping information, select cash on delivery, place an order, and see the success screen.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the shipping name field
Fill in the shipping phone number field
Fill in the shipping address field
Fill in the shipping city field
Select cash on delivery as the payment method
Verify the order success screen is displayed

title: Log in and reach the home screen
description: Verifies that a registered shopper can log in with valid credentials and land on the home screen.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the home screen is displayed

title: Add a product to the cart from its detail page
description: Verifies that a shopper can choose a quantity on a product page and add the item to the cart successfully.

steps.description: Open a product from the product feed
Select a quantity for the product
Add the product to the cart
Verify the product is added to the cart

title: Register a new account and complete verification
description: Verifies that a new shopper can create an account, complete phone verification, and land on the home screen.

steps.description: Fill in the first name field with Test
Fill in the last name field with User
Fill in the phone number field with a valid phone number
Fill in the email field with a unique valid email address
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Fill in the confirm password field with the same password
Enter a valid phone verification code
Verify the home screen is displayed

title: Update cart quantities and remove an item
description: Verifies that a logged-in shopper can manage cart contents and see totals update accordingly.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Update an item quantity in the cart
Remove an item from the cart
Verify the cart reflects the removal

title: Browse home banners categories and product feeds
description: Verifies that a shopper can explore the home screen content and open a product from the feed.

steps.description: Scroll to browse the home content
Open a product from the feed
Verify a product detail screen is displayed

title: View product details before buying
description: Verifies that a shopper can open a product, review its details, and see related shopping information before taking action.

steps.description: Open a product from the product feed

title: Search for a product and open a matching result
description: Verifies that a shopper can search for a product, see matching results refresh, and open a result detail page.

steps.description: Wait for search results to refresh
Verify a product detail screen is displayed

title: Switch product filters and open a product from the grid
description: Verifies that a shopper can change home product filters, browse the filtered grid, and open a product detail page.

steps.description: Switch to a different product filter
Open a product from the filtered grid
Verify a product detail screen is displayed

title: View order history and open an order
description: This verifies that a logged-in shopper can browse their order list and open an order to see its details.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the order details are displayed
Verify the order status tracker is displayed

title: Save and remove a product from wishlist
description: Verifies that a shopper can toggle wishlist status from a product page and see the saved state change.

steps.description: Open a product from the product feed
Verify the product is saved to the wishlist
Toggle the product wishlist status again
Verify the product is removed from the wishlist

title: Update profile information
description: This verifies that a logged-in shopper can edit personal information and see the updated profile reflected afterward.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the updated profile details are displayed

title: Manage addresses from profile settings
description: This verifies that a logged-in shopper can add, edit, delete, and set a default address from profile settings.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the address list is displayed
Verify the default address is updated

title: Browse products by category and open a result
description: Verifies that a shopper can select a category from discovery and open a product from the category grid.

steps.description: Open a product from the category grid
Verify a product detail screen is displayed

title: Review order details and status after purchase
description: Verifies that a shopper can open a recent order and inspect its details and status tracker after placing an order.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the order status tracker is displayed

title: Add and remove a product from wishlist
description: This verifies that a shopper can toggle a product’s wishlist status from the product detail screen.

steps.description: Open a product from the product feed
Toggle the wishlist status on the product detail screen
Verify the product is added to wishlist
Verify the product is removed from wishlist

title: Apply a promo code during checkout
description: Verifies that a logged-in shopper can enter shipping details, apply a promo code, and see the total update before placing an order.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the shipping name field
Fill in the shipping phone number field
Fill in the shipping address field
Fill in the shipping city field
Select cash on delivery as the payment method
Verify the order total is updated
Verify the applied discount is shown

title: View saved products and open a wishlist item
description: This verifies that a shopper can browse saved items in the wishlist and open a saved product from there.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the product detail screen is displayed
Verify the product is still marked as saved

title: Switch the app language from profile
description: This verifies that a logged-in shopper can change the interface language and see the app update to the selected language.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the interface updates to the selected language

title: Browse product tabs and reviews
description: Verifies that a shopper can switch between product information sections and inspect reviews before buying.

steps.description: Open a product from the product feed

title: Open a campaign page from a home banner and continue shopping
description: Verifies that a shopper can navigate from a home banner to a campaign page and open a campaign product.

steps.description: Open a product from the campaign products
Verify a product detail screen is displayed

title: Submit a product review
description: Verifies that a logged-in shopper can rate a product, write a comment, and see the review added on the product page.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open a product from the product feed
Enter a review rating for the product
Verify the new review is displayed

title: See an empty order history state
description: This verifies that a logged-in shopper with no orders sees an empty orders experience and can return to shopping.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify an empty state message is visible
Verify product browsing content is displayed

title: See an empty wishlist state
description: This verifies that a shopper with no saved items sees the empty wishlist experience.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify an empty state message is visible

title: Log out from profile
description: This verifies that a logged-in shopper can log out and return to the login screen.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the login screen is displayed

title: Clear the cart and see an empty state
description: Verifies that a logged-in shopper can clear all cart items and land on an empty cart view.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify an empty cart state is displayed

title: Delete the account from profile settings
description: This verifies that a logged-in shopper can start account deletion, confirm it, and see the account removal flow.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the account removed flow is displayed

title: View empty notifications placeholder
description: A guest or logged-in shopper can open notifications and see the empty placeholder state.

steps.description: Verify an empty state message is visible
Verify the notifications placeholder remains visible

title: Refresh the notifications placeholder
description: A shopper can refresh the notifications screen and still see the empty placeholder state.

steps.description: Pull to refresh the notifications screen
Verify an empty state message is visible
Verify the notifications placeholder remains visible

title: Return to the placeholder after viewing notifications
description: A shopper can revisit the notifications area from normal browsing and see the same empty placeholder state.

steps.description: Verify an empty state message is visible
Verify the notifications placeholder remains visible
